Field.Label: Water Leak Monitor — settings are read from IndigoSecrets.py first (where applicable). The fields below are a fallback for users without IndigoSecrets.py.
Leak Sensor Device ID:
Field.Description: Indigo device ID of the water leak sensor to monitor.

Field.Label: Alert Email Address:
Field.Description: Fallback recipient for leak-alert emails. Used only if WATERLEAK_ALERT_EMAIL is missing from IndigoSecrets.py.

Field.defaultValue: [URGENT ALERT] Bathroom Boiler Water Leak Detected
Field.Label: Email Subject:
